caption: A woman with dark hair in a high bun and braids wears a dark green t-shirt featuring a circular logo with the text "SSTALK101" and a silver watch on her left wrist. She is seated in a studio setting, speaking and gesturing with her hands in front of a professional black microphone. Behind her is a black backdrop with white and red text that includes "BOSS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "CAST", and "About It!". To her left, a framed picture of a person's hands is mounted on a white wall. A small logo reading "BOSS TALK 101" appears in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, though her facial expression and hand gestures shift as she continues to speak, moving her hands closer together and then apart to emphasize her points.
